items.example: First, I woke up and took a shower.

Later, we had dinner at a local restaurant.

Before long, she felt much better.
A short while later, the bus arrived.
One day, I decided to learn a new language.

By the time we got there, the film had started.
At last, the rain stopped and we went outside.
